Description: Chief survey. Collect baseline data on villages. Used for treatment assignment.
CAHWs nominations by the Paramount Chiefs and communities
CAHW baseline survey. Baseline survey and tests for eligibility. If the village had a CAHW suggested by both the PC and the community, the survey would take place with both.
CAHW training for 23 days. Across 10 sites in Koidu, by 20 MAFFS facilitators.
Household baseline survey. Survey with eight individuals per village.
Installation of the CAHWs in each village. CAHW introduction to their community. Also included intro of the OH platform and assignment to incentive scheme. In total, 284/287 CAHWs were installed.

CAHW performance round 1. Data collected from field practical and field visits. 
Field practical: A total of 267/287 CAHWs participated in this exercise. Those who did not scored 0. 8 of 267 had not sent in any form: they get the same score as during the animal exercise. 
Village visit: Visited 287 villages. 20 CAHWs had not submitted any filled forms so could not be judged: `Communities with no monitoring forms to follow-up' (20 obs.) get the standardized mean value as their final score.

Village visits:
In CM treatments: Community feedback meeting 1. Review OH project, the statement of expectations, and the `report card'. 
In P4P treatments: Enumerators delivered the incentive payments to the CAHWs in person, but in public in the P4P&CM treatments.

CAHW performance round 2. Data collected from field practical and field visits. A total of 276 (out of 287) CAHWs participated.
(As part of the village visits: they also did CAHW satisfaction surveys, and Town Chief Animal Census)
Date: Practical: Nov 2018; Village visits: Mar - Apr 2019

Description:
Village visits:
In CM treatments: see above
In P4P treatments: see above
Household endline data, including the COVID-19 behavioral measure.
